summary: Completed testing of Phase C - Threshold Subscription & Conversion Features. All backend endpoints passed (17/17 tests). Frontend UI verified: (1) Daily Picks section on /trending-products shows 5 product cards with star icon and date, (2) ThresholdSubscriptionCard renders on /alerts with toggle, slider, categories, and save button, (3) Locked Supplier and Ad sections display for free users with upgrade prompts, (4) Features nav link scrolls to #features section, (5) Enhanced OG meta tags present on PublicProductPage (/p/:id) including og:image, twitter:card, product:price.

issues: product:price:amount shows 0 because public API doesn't expose estimated_retail_price (by design for upsell)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/daily-picks returns 200
Backend: GET /api/public/daily-picks returns picks array with date field
Backend: GET /api/public/daily-picks returns max 5 products with required fields (id, slug, product_name, launch_score, margin_percent)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/threshold-subscription requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/threshold-subscription returns subscription data for authenticated user
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/threshold-subscription requires authentication (401)
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/threshold-subscription updates enabled, score_threshold, categories
Backend: GET /api/user/daily-usage requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/user/daily-usage returns daily_limit, insights_used, remaining fields
Backend: POST /api/user/track-insight requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/user/track-insight increments insights_used counter
Backend: POST /api/user/track-insight returns limit_reached field
Backend: Admin user can access threshold subscription endpoint
Backend: Admin user has elite plan with high/unlimited daily limit
Frontend: Features nav link on landing page scrolls to #features section
Frontend: Daily Picks section renders on /trending-products with star icon, Today's Picks heading, 5 product cards
Frontend: ThresholdSubscriptionCard renders on /alerts (elite plan route) with toggle switch, slider, category filters, email/in-app checkboxes, save button
Frontend: Product detail page shows 'Unlock Score Breakdown' locked section for free users
Frontend: Product detail page shows 'Unlock Supplier Intelligence' locked section for free users
Frontend: PublicProductPage (/p/:id) has og:title, og:description, og:type='product' meta tags
Frontend: PublicProductPage has og:image meta tag when product has image
Frontend: PublicProductPage has twitter:card='summary_large_image' meta tag
Frontend: PublicProductPage has product:price:amount and product:price:currency meta tags
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase C Threshold & Conversion features fully tested. (1) Threshold subscription endpoints working at /api/notifications/threshold-subscription (GET/PUT) - stores enabled, score_threshold, categories, email_alerts, in_app_alerts. (2) Daily usage tracking at /api/user/daily-usage and /api/user/track-insight - free users have 2 insights/day limit. (3) Daily picks at /api/public/daily-picks returns 5 products. (4) ThresholdSubscriptionCard is in TrendAlertsPage which is accessed at /alerts (elite feature). (5) ProductDetailPage tracks insight usage in useEffect. (6) LockedContent wrapper used for Supplier and Ad sections for free users. (7) PublicProductPage at /p/:id has enhanced OG tags including product:price meta tags. (8) Note: /trend-alerts route redirects to /alerts for authenticated users.

Threshold Subscription GET.details: Returns user subscription with enabled, score_threshold, categories, email_alerts, in_app_alerts

Daily Usage API.details: Returns plan, daily_limit, insights_used, remaining, is_unlimited

Daily Picks API.details: Returns 5 curated products with id, slug, product_name, launch_score, margin_percent

Daily Picks Section UI.details: Star icon, Today's Picks heading, formatted date, 5 product cards

ThresholdSubscriptionCard.details: Toggle, slider (30-95), category filters, email/in-app checkboxes, Save button

Locked Supplier Section.details: Free users see 'Unlock Supplier Intelligence' with blur overlay

Locked Ad Section.details: Free users see 'Unlock Ad Intelligence' with blur overlay (below Ad Performance section)

Features Nav Scroll.details: Features link in nav scrolls to #features section using scrollIntoView

PublicProductPage OG Tags.details: og:title, og:description, og:image, og:type=product, twitter:card=summary_large_image, product:price:amount, product:price:currency=GBP

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints return real data from MongoDB
